name: flutter-help
description: Interactive help system for discovering Flutter Dev Assistant commands, skills, and assistants with search and filtering capabilities

purpose.overview: Provides an interactive interface for exploring the Flutter Dev Assistant's 42 total resources: 8 Commands (workflow automation), 23 Skills (knowledge modules), and 11 Assistants (specialized AI).
useCases: You're new to Flutter Dev Assistant and want to learn what's available
You need to find a specific command, skill, or assistant
You're not sure which tool to use for your current task
You want to explore topics like state management, animations, or IoT
You need to understand when to use different assistants

category.description: Show specific category. 'commands': Show all 8 workflow commands. 'skills': Show all 23 knowledge modules. 'assistants': Show all 11 specialized assistants

itemName.description: Show detailed information about a specific command, skill, or assistant. Examples: flutter-verify, state-management-comparison, Flutter Architect

search.description: Search across all resources for keyword (case-insensitive). Example: /flutter-help --search=riverpod

format.description: 'table': Compact table view with summaries. 'detailed': Full information with examples and related resources

projectPath.description: Absolute path to the Flutter project to analyze. If not provided, uses the current workspace directory.

interactiveMode.description: When invoked without parameters, enters interactive mode with menu-driven navigation
navigation: Category Selection: Choose which resource type to explore
Item Listing: View summarized list of items in category
Detail View: Get complete information about selected item
Related Resources: Discover connected commands, skills, and assistants
Back/Quit: Navigate back to previous menu or exit

items: Best Practices Enforcer: Code quality & checks
Flutter Build Resolver: Build error diagnosis
UI Consistency Checker: Design system checks

searchAlgorithm.grouping: Results grouped by category (Skills, Assistants, Commands)

commands.source: Parsed dynamically from commands/*.md YAML frontmatter

skills.source: Parsed from docs/SKILLS_INDEX.md organized summary tables

assistants.source: Static list from assistant file headers and descriptions

categoryListView.actions: Select item (1-N), 'b' for back, 'q' to quit

searchResults.actions: Select result (1-N), 'n' for new search, 'q' to quit

relatedCommands.description: Extract learning patterns from development sessions
Initialize projects (reference for interactive mode pattern)

relatedSkills.description: Comprehensive skill reference with decision trees for state management, animations, IoT, architecture, performance, theming, and package evaluation

implementationNotes.interactiveImplementation: Uses AskUserQuestion tool for menu-driven navigation: category selection, item selection from lists, search input, navigation options (back, quit)
implementationNotes.fileStructure: All command info stored in markdown with YAML frontmatter. Single source of truth for each resource. Links enable easy reference and documentation lookup. No hardcoded descriptions — all derived from actual files
implementationNotes.gracefulDegradation: Gracefully handles missing or malformed files. All links include full file paths for direct reference. Compatible with both Claude Code and Kiro IDE

requirements: Flutter SDK 3.0.0+ (for consistency with other commands)
Read access to command, skill, and assistant markdown files
No external dependencies or network requirements
notes: Help command is read-only and makes no changes to code
File paths in output are absolute for easy navigation
Interactive mode works in any development environment
Search is fast even with 42 total resources
Gracefully handles missing or malformed files
All links include full file paths for direct reference
Compatible with both Claude Code and Kiro IDE
nextSteps: Read docs/SKILLS_INDEX.md — Decision trees and topic guides
Explore specific skill files — Detailed patterns and examples
Check assistant documentation — Specialized knowledge bases
